title: Dungeon Clusters
description: Transform your Minecraft dungeons with Dungeon Clusters, a mod that adds a touch of vanilla charm to your dungeons, perfect for building monster farms and creating exciting new challenges. [datapack version]
body:
## Intro : Add variety to your Minecraft world with the *Dungeon Clusters* datapack! This datapack introduces **four unique dungeons** and the ability to find **clusters of dungeons**, making it perfect for creating large-scale **monster farms**. ### Key Features: - **Four Types of Dungeons**: Explore four distinct types of dungeons: - **Zombie Dungeon** - **Creeper Dungeon** - **Skeleton Dungeon** - **Spider Dungeon** - **Dungeon Design**: Dungeons are compact rooms made from **cobblestone** and **mossy cobblestone**, featuring a **mob spawner** and up to **2 chests** containing loot. - **Dungeon Clusters**: Discover **clusters of dungeons** that can contain up to **27 spawners** in a single area. These clusters allow you to create massive **monster farms** for efficient mob farming and resource gathering. ### Features Summary: - **Four Dungeon Types**: Zombie, Creeper, Skeleton, and Spider Dungeons. - **Dungeon Clusters**: Up to **27 spawners** in a single cluster. - **Loot Chests**: Each dungeon contains up to **2 chests** with loot. - **Perfect for Monster Farming**: Use dungeon clusters to create **massive monster farms**. This datapack is ideal for players who love **monster farming** or enjoy exploring **Minecraft’s dungeon systems**. ## Discover More Amazing Mods! Enjoy this mod? Don’t miss future updates! Click the Follow button on the project page to get notified when new content is released. 💚🚀 ## Partners : This project is proudly supported by BisectHosting. Check out their services to easily host your projects with quality and reliability.

## Call to Action : Have questions? Need help? Join us on Discord or visit our GitHub to get involved with the community and contribute!
